title: Marcel Vanthoor
text: Home * People * Marcel Vanthoor Marcel Vanthoor , a Dutch software engineer and computer chess programmer. He has already written a very basic chess program in Turbo Pascal [1] , and started a chess programming comeback in 2020 with his didactic chess engine Rustic written in Rust [2] . Progress on Rustic is topic of his CCC thread, explaining all his development trials [3] .
